entities.description: As a subsection of 'Hardware Resources', this section provides detailed information about the RAM (Random Access Memory) hardware resource included on the SOM-TL3588 industrial core board, which is part of the broader hardware specification documentation.
Refers to the Random Access Memory hardware component, which is discussed in detail within section 1.3.

relations.description: The concept of 'RAM' is the primary topic of section 1.3.
